productName: LAFF GAS Mini 5 pack - 2.5g - 9lb Hammer (OG) ) & Northern Lights (Pure Extracts) (I)
description: A indica infused joint built on 9lb Hammer and elevated with potent extract, blended in for an even burn and a noticeably bigger hit than flower alone. Built for a stronger, longer session and more intense effects — with notes of lime, earthy, and berry, with a slow, mellow wind-down vibe. A little goes a long way.
